compressed_context:
H1: RENEWABLE-ENERGY  
CLAIM: ENERGY=PUBLIC-GOOD; SUPPLY→ECONOMIC-FUNCTION(EACH-STATE)  
CLAIM: INTERNAL-ENERGY-MARKET STRENGTHEN NECESSARY ∴ EU-COMPETITIVENESS+GROWTH  
CLAIM: UNFETTERED-LIBERALISATION RISK: DOMESTIC-SUPPLIES OUTCOMPETED BY NEIGHBOUR-PIPES ⇒ NATIONAL-SECURITY-THREAT  
CLAIM: ENERGY-SECTOR CENTRAL TO ECONOMY ∧ INTERESTS CONCENTRATED ⇒ ENERGY-POLICY=POLITICAL-CHALLENGE FOR MEMBER-STATES  
ACTION: MEMBER-STATES BALANCE SHORT-TERM LIBERALISATION-BENEFITS VS LONG-TERM TRANSITION-OBJECTIVES  
CLAIM: LOCAL-SCALE UNSUSTAINABLE-PRODUCTION MAY SEEM VIABLE BUT CAUSES ENVIRONMENTAL-JUSTICE CONFLICT (WIND-POWER PROTESTS≠NIMBYISM)  
CLAIM: DECENTRALIZED-RENEWABLE-ATTRACTIVENESS DEPENDS ON ENERGY-SECURITY↑ ∧ GHG-EMISSIONS↓ ∧ JOBS↑ ∧ RURAL-DEVELOPMENT  
CLAIM: EXCESSIVE-LOCAL-GENERATION ↛ NECESSARILY HINDER TRANSITION; COMPETES WITH SHALE-GAS+FOSSIL-SOURCES  
CLAIM: DEPLOYMENT-DECENTRALIZED-RENEWABLES DEPENDS ON RESOURCE-AVAILABILITY ∧ PROCEEDS→ECONOMIC+SOCIAL-BENEFITS ∧ CULTURAL-PREFERENCES
